title: althaea arbelensis
intro: Althaea arbelensis, also known as the Arabian marshmallow plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Althaea arbelensis are due to its high mucilage content, which can help to protect and soothe irritated tissues, and its antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce oxidative stress. Althaea arbelensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support skin health.
